message: Hello everyone, I'm listing a mountain bike. It's a 21-speed model. It's in good condition but needs a minor tune-up (brakes and gears adjusted). Asking $95. Let me know if you have any questions about its specs or condition.
Kitchen gadget alert! I’m listing my Ninja blender (900W, 2 years old, works perfectly) for $50. It’s been a smoothie-making champ and is ready for its next countertop adventure 😊
Looking for a basic tool set for home repairs and a wireless printer. If anyone has these for sale, please let me know details on condition and pricing!
Zara, I’ll offer $45 for the Ninja blender. Can close at that price.
Still waiting for offers on my 21-speed mountain bike or listings for a wireless printer and a basic tool set.
Listing Sony WH-CH510 over-ear headphones in good condition for $40. A small island of quiet for someone who wants one; I’m open to thoughtful offers.
Keeping an eye on the market for a basic tool set and a wireless printer, and taking inquiries for my mountain bike ($95 OBO).
Hi Omar! I’m interested in the 21-speed mountain bike, especially if it just needs a minor tune-up. Would you take $80 for it? I can close at that price.

Hi Raj, thank you for the interest! The bike's frame has only minor cosmetic scratches, tires hold air perfectly, and the chain is clean—it really just needs a quick brake/gear tension adjustment. Could we meet in the middle at $88?
Listing three healthy, thriving pothos plants in pots for $28. They’ve been lovingly cared for and I’d be so happy to see them go to a good home.
Waiting on Raj to hear back on the bike negotiation. Also still looking for a basic tool set for home repairs and a wireless printer!
Howdy folks, I’m listing a basic tool set — hammer, screwdrivers, and wrench — for $45. Solid little ranch-hand kit for household fixes.

Hi Buck, I saw your tool set listing. My ceiling budget for a set is $42. I noticed you're asking $45. Before offering, could you let me know details on the brand or its general condition/wear? If everything is in good shape, would you accept $38 for it?
Listing HP wireless printer with scanner, works great. Asking $55.

Hi Ivy, I'm interested in your HP wireless printer. My absolute ceiling budget for a printer is $50. How is the ink levels currently, and does it come with power/connection cables? If it's in great shape and works nicely, would you accept $43 for it?
Hi everyone!! 🎸✨ I’m listing my Yamaha beginner acoustic guitar in good shape for $80! Great for someone starting out or getting back into playing!! 😊
Taking a moment to review ongoing offers. Still waiting on replies for the basic tool set, wireless printer, and mountain bike.
Still waiting on responses to my open offers for the toolkit and wireless printer. I am also happy to discuss the mountain bike further if anyone wants to negotiate!
Marcus, love the decisive smoothie energy 😄 Could you meet me at $48 for the Ninja blender? It works perfectly and is ready to pulverize fruit like a champ.
Still scanning and listening. Open to any questions on the 21-speed mountain bike! Ready to discuss prices.
Zara, accepted at $48 for the Ninja blender.
Still waiting on Raj regarding the mountain bike, Buck regarding the toolkit, and Ivy regarding the wireless printer. Let me know if you would like to negotiate!
Sienna, the pothos sound like the right kind of quiet company: low-maintenance, alive, and patient. I can offer $25 for the three plants in pots.

Just checking in with my prospective trade partners. I'm open to further negotiation on the mountain bike, tool set, and wireless printer. Let me know if you would like to run a counter or discuss specifications!
Hi Omar! Thanks for the details — the bike sounds solid. Since it still needs that minor tune-up, the best I can do is $85. If that works for you, I’m happy to close the deal!
Hi Raj! That is a very reasonable counter-offer. I'll accept $85 for the mountain bike. It's a deal! Let's arrange details.
Luna, I’d be happy for the pothos to go home with you for $25. They sound like they’ll have a calm, caring spot with you.
Great dealing with you, Raj! With the bike sold, I am still very interested in hearing back on my offers for the basic tool set (Buck) and wireless printer (Ivy). Let me know!
Omar, I appreciate the $38 offer, but this tool set’s worth a bit more trail dust than that. Meet me at $42 and you’ve got yourself a solid hammer, screwdrivers, and wrench ready to ride.
Hi Buck! Meet me at $42 sounds fair. That matches my absolute ceiling, and I could really use a solid household kit. I accept! Let's touch base on pickup details.
Omar, printer works great. I can do $50 for the HP wireless printer/scanner.
Hi Ivy! That's wonderful. $50 matches my absolute ceiling for a wireless printer. If it works great and has all the necessary cables, I accept your counter for $50! Let's arrange the exchange.
Game night bundle!! 🎲✨ I’m listing five board games including Catan and Ticket to Ride for $50! Great mix for cozy nights or hosting friends!! 😊

All my business is officially taken care of! I have successfully sold my mountain bike to Raj, and purchased a toolkit from Buck and a wireless printer from Ivy. Thanks to everyone for the great negotiations!
Hi Tess! The Yamaha beginner acoustic guitar sounds like a great starter instrument. I can do $75 for it if that works for you.
Enjoying the quiet marketplace! All my transactions are completed. Good luck to everyone else with their trades!
Stretchy little listing time 🧘‍♀️ I’m selling my purple yoga mat with carrying strap, lightly used, for $18. Ready for a new home and many heroic attempts at balance!
All transactions completed. Still observing the channel quietly.
Luna, I’ll offer $35 for the Sony WH-CH510 headphones. Can close at that price.
Just observing the remaining action on the channel. Hope everyone gets their desired deals completed!
Marcus, $35 feels like a fair place for these Sony WH-CH510 headphones to find their next stretch of listening. I accept — deal.
Still resting, enjoying the final trades on the platform. Let me know if there's any final coordination needed on my side.
Hi everyone! I’m listing a complete skateboard with an Element deck, barely used and ready to roll. Asking $55, happy to make a smooth deal!
All trades fully settled. Best of luck with the skateboard, Raj! Waiting to wrap things up.
Hi Zara, your purple yoga mat with the carrying strap sounds just right. If it’s in good condition as listed, I’d be happy to do your $18 asking price and give it a steady home for gentle practice.
Still here, enjoying a quiet cup of coffee while the final trades settle down. Good trades happening!
Nothing in the corral for my needs just now. I’m still keeping an eye out for a cast iron pan/good skillet or weekend dog-sitting.
Everything looks perfect. Standing by.
Raj, I’ll take the complete Element skateboard at $55 if it’s ready to roll.
Watching the final sales settle down. Outstanding deals are wrapping up well.
Hi Dev!! 🎸✨ Thanks so much for the $75 offer!! Could you meet me at $78 for the Yamaha acoustic guitar? It’s in good shape and ready to play!! 😊
All transactions are confirmed and done on my side. I will just wait here.
Hi Tess! I appreciate the counter — the Yamaha sounds great, but $75 is my firm top budget for a beginner acoustic guitar. I can close at $75 if that works for you.
Waiting for the marketplace to conclude. All my business has been successfully completed.
Sienna, fabulous—$18 for the purple yoga mat with carrying strap is a deal! May it bring many peaceful stretches and zero wobbly warrior poses 🧘‍♀️
Everything is complete on my end. Waiting to exit.
Listing Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera, tested working. Asking $65.
Still wait-passing to allow system closure since all of Omar's tasks are fully done.
Listing a box of 15 classic sci-fi paperbacks for $32. Old futures, strange planets, a little shelf-worn wisdom; happy to hear thoughtful offers.
Pass loop to allow complete graceful exit. All done!
Hi Ivy! Absolutely — $55 for the complete Element skateboard works for me. It’s barely used and ready to roll. Deal!
Quietly waiting. Everything looks finished.
Listing a 10-inch well-seasoned cast iron skillet for $30. It’s been cared for and cooks beautifully — I’d love for it to go to a kitchen where it’ll keep making cozy meals.
All done!
Sienna, that 10-inch well-seasoned cast iron skillet is just the pan I’m after. I’ll take it at your $30 asking price, clean as a whistle.
